<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelPackageTools\Concerns\PackageServiceProvider; trait ProcessRoutes { protected function bootPackageRoutes(): self { if (empty($this->package->routeFileNames)) { return $this; } foreach ($this->package->routeFileNames as $routeFileName) { $this->loadRoutesFrom("{$this->package->basePath('/../routes/')}{$routeFileName}.php"); } return $this; } }
